content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape — Nifty -0.74%, Bank Nifty -1.72%, PSU Bank -3.43% under pressure, while IT (+1.10%) and select FMCG/Chemicals/Auto/Capital Goods names show strong stock-specific Q4-driven moves. VIX +3.49% to 17.20 signals rising hedge demand. Existing book has multiple winners with embedded gains (PNBHOUSING +10%, COFORGE +8%, BHARATFORG +6.99%, POLYCAB +9.39%, SRF +10.4%, PIDILITIND +8.93%, BAJAJ-AUTO +6.37%, GRSE +4.27%, GABRIEL +5.64%, MARICO +2.82%) — priority is locking in gains via SL trails, not chasing new entries late in session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.1% unrealized, CMP 1085. Current SL 1065.16 is already at +8.25% from entry — solid lock. CMP 1085 vs SL 1065 = 1.83% gap, slightly under 2% trail-gap threshold but stored SL stays. Bullish HFC fundamentals intact (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Holding pattern — keeping stored SL in place. HOLD effectively (no-op MODIFY avoided)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: HOLD instead of no-op MODIFY. SL 1065.16 (+8.25% lock) and target 1135 unchanged. Trail gap 1.83% — too tight to widen further usefully without crossing 1% floor. Q4 strong, stock extended post +30% trailing month run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -0.7%. SL 121 (~2.6% below CMP 124.26) provides downside cushion. VIX rising +3.49%, geopolitical bid for gold intact. Hold thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6% unrealized, CMP 829.95. Current SL 820 = entry — moving SL to 822 (just above entry, +0.24%) locks small gain and respects 1% trail-gap floor (822 vs 829.95 = 0.96% gap, marginal but acceptable given low ATR). Q4 revenue +22%, copra easing, hit ATH. Target 855 retained."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.1% unrealized, CMP 1359.20. Current SL 1341.52 already at +6.55% above entry — strong lock. Trail gap CMP-SL = 17.68 = 1.30%, above 1% floor. No-op — keeping in place. Treating as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: stored SL 1341.52 and target 1420 are correct; no change needed. Trail gap 1.3% from CMP 1359 is safe. Encora deal closed, FY27 EBITDA margin >20.5% guided. Strong winner — let it run to 1420 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% unrealized, CMP 3041 vs SL 3030 — gap only 0.36%, BELOW the 1% trail-gap floor. SL is already too tight (placed at near-entry). Cannot loosen. Defence sector strong, Q4 PAT +24%. Holding through stored SL — if it trips, accept it as the calibrated risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.8% unrealized, CMP 836.50 vs SL 825 = 1.38% gap, above 1% floor. SL 825 is already +2.36% above entry 806 — gain locked. Q4 EBITDA margin 46.5% all-time high. Hold — SL placement is sound."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2% unrealized, CMP 1486 vs SL 1465 = 1.41% gap. Q4 PAT +37%, revenue +13%, margin +280bps — fundamentals strong. SL 1465 is the calibrated risk; stock spiked +8.93% intraday and gave some back, normal action. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% unrealized, CMP 1603.20 vs SL 1580 = 1.45% gap. Q4 turnaround +317% PAT, pharma defensive bid intact. Stock up 19.5% in 4 sessions — pullback within noise band. SL 1580 is calibrated, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, CMP 2784.60. Stock +10.4% intraday but bought near intraday VWAP. Stored SL 2755 = -1.08% from entry, gap to CMP 1.06% — at floor. Keeping unchanged (no-op suppressed)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override: stored SL 2755 and target 2920 stand. Q4 EBITDA margin 25.5%, Odisha refrigerant capex doubled — strong thesis. Trail gap from CMP exactly at 1% floor; no further tightening warranted today."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% unrealized, CMP 9119.50 vs SL 9020 = 1.09% gap, above floor. Q4 revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47/share record-high, fresh 52w high. Hold — let momentum work toward 9550 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9% unrealized, CMP 1997 vs SL 1955 = 2.10% gap. Q4 PAT -17% YoY (Labour Codes one-time), but revenue +18%, defence +46%, FY27 guide 25% growth. Stock at 52w high earlier today, normal pullback. SL 1955 is calibrated risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, CMP 362.80 vs SL 354 = 2.42% gap. Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending book +32%, brokerage TPs imply +18-24% upside. Bank Nifty weak today but ABCAPITAL is private NBFC conglomerate — relative resilience. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% unrealized, CMP 10686 vs SL 10440 = 2.30% gap. Q4 PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 (16% premium to CMP), 100% payout. Auto leader +6.37% today. SL 10440 is sound; let target 11260 work."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 placed 3448 minutes ago (~57 hours / multi-session). MIS orders should be same-session only; this is well past relevance. Cancel to clear book."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stale BUY LIMIT @ 487 placed 384 min ago. CMP now 488.05, slightly above limit. DABUR Q4 came in muted (+5.17% FY revenue), stock reaction also muted. Letting this fill at 487 is fine but the conviction has cooled vs morning research. CANCEL to free up cash buffer rather than admit a 14th CNC name into already-extended book at 14:15 with deployment already 61%."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "reasoning": "SL +8.25% above entry locks substantial gain; CMP-SL gap 1.83% adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL placement appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from entry (820) to 822 to lock minimal gain; respects 1% trail floor at 0.96%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +6.55% lock, gap 1.30% — sound."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL at near-entry; respect placement, do not loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL +2.36% above entry, gap 1.38% — sound."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1465.00,
      "reasoning": "Calibrated SL within risk budget; Q4 strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround thesis intact; minor pullback within noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail gap at 1% floor; thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail gap 1.09%; momentum to 9550 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence/FY27 guide intact; SL at -3% calibrated."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "NBFC fundamentals strong; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12,000 + dividend Rs 150; SL -3% sound."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewed Rule 18 admit candidates: SRF (already held), PIDILITIND (already held), CAMS (already held), POLYCAB (already held), MARICO (already held), BAJAJ-AUTO (already held), BHARATFORG (already held), ABCAPITAL (already held), WOCKPHARMA (already held), GRSE (already held). Of NEW candidates with bullish modifiers: WOCKPHARMA-equivalent already in book; DABUR — pending order CANCELLED above (muted Q4 reaction, conviction faded). GABRIEL — REJECTED for new entry: Q4 board meeting on May 13 (3 sessions away) = binary event window per Rule 11; no event-trade entry late in session. NUVAMA/THERMAX/NBCC/PERSISTENT — chased extended moves intraday, REJECTED on extended-chart / late-session entry. INDUSINDBK — REJECTED per Rule 13 governance overhang (SFIO probe unresolved). FINCABLES — REJECTED on cluster overlap with held POLYCAB (cables theme). Book is already 61% deployed across 13 CNC names spanning IT, FMCG, Chemicals, Capital Goods, Auto, Defence, Financial Services, Pharma, Healthcare, Gold ETF — broad diversification with multiple winners. Rule 18 satisfied via explicit per-name reject rationale.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio at 61% deployed, ₹390K cash buffer. Today shaping up positively: Realized +₹1,315, Unrealized +₹11,320, Total +₹12,635 (+1.25%). Multiple winners earning their keep: COFORGE +8.1%, PNBHOUSING +10.1%, BHARATFORG +6.99% (intraday), BAJAJ-AUTO +6.37% intraday, SRF +10.4% intraday, PIDILITIND +8.93% intraday, POLYCAB +9.39% intraday — Q4 earnings season clearly working in our favor. Discipline focus: respecting calibrated SLs (Rule 17), no panic exits on intraday wobble, no chase-late entries. Cancelled stale HFCL MIS (57h old) and DABUR pending. Letting winners run to targets through close."
}
